name: wp-content-eslint
description: ESLint configuration for WordPress plugins and themes

scripts.copy:insert-figure: mkdir -p blocks/insert-figure/build && cp blocks/insert-figure/src/block.json blocks/insert-figure/build/block.json && cp blocks/insert-figure/src/render.php blocks/insert-figure/build/render.php && cp blocks/insert-figure/src/index.css blocks/insert-figure/build/index.css 2>/dev/null || true && cp blocks/insert-figure/src/style-index.css blocks/insert-figure/build/style-index.css 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build:insert-figure: npm run clean:insert-figure && wp-scripts build blocks/insert-figure/src/index.js blocks/insert-figure/src/view.js --output-path=blocks/insert-figure/build && npm run copy:insert-figure
scripts.start:insert-figure: npm run copy:insert-figure && wp-scripts start blocks/insert-figure/src/index.js blocks/insert-figure/src/view.js --output-path=blocks/insert-figure/build
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:php-js
scripts.lint:js:report: eslint --ext .js plugins/ themes/ --ignore-pattern 'plugins/graphic_data_plugin/admin/exopite-simple-options/**' --format json --output-file eslint-report.json || true
